title: WELCOME HOME OREGON INC - 211info
text: WELCOME HOME OREGON INC WELCOME HOME OREGON INC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides re-entry housing along with assistance for food, clothing, employment, and mentorship. 510 NW 4th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Individuals who were recently released from a correctional facility and are on supervised release Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm by appointment only Email (541) 474-5178 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (541) 474-5178 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Curry and Josephine Counties Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Ex-Offender Reentry Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
